description: AI Reader: open a featured book, scroll into the text, invoke AI Actions → Summarize. Demonstrates the on-device + cloud AI working over book content. Works in simulator with network + mChatAI Cloud configured.

scenes.name: Tap AI Reader
scenes.narration: AI Reader brings public-domain books to life with AI.
scenes.fallbackNarration: AI Reader pairs your library with on-demand AI.

scenes.name: Pick a featured book
scenes.narration: Pick something from the featured shelf.

scenes.name: Open the book
scenes.narration: Open it - the full text loads instantly.

scenes.name: Show the text
scenes.narration: Crisp typography, your size, your way.

scenes.name: Open AI Actions
scenes.narration: Tap the menu and pick AI Actions.
scenes.fallbackNarration: Open the menu - AI Actions sits at the top.

scenes.name: Summarize the chapter
scenes.narration: Summarize. AI gives you the gist of the chapter in seconds.
scenes.fallbackNarration: Pick Summarize and AI gives you the gist.

scenes.name: Back to home
scenes.narration: Get mChatAI on the App Store today.
